# .gitignore

```
# dependencies
node_modules/
.pnp
.pnp.js

# testing
/coverage

# next.js
/.next/
/out/

# production
/build

# misc
.DS_Store
*.pem
.env
.env.local
.env.development.local
.env.test.local
.env.production.local

# debug
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# vercel
.vercel

# PWA auto-generated files
public/sw.js
public/workbox-*.js
```

# DEPLOY.md

```md
# NexMedicon HMS — Complete Deployment Guide
# Deploy from localhost to Vercel production (shareable URL for doctors)

---

## PREREQUISITES (do these once)

1. Create accounts (free):
   - https://github.com       — stores your code
   - https://vercel.com       — hosts your app
   - https://supabase.com     — your database

2. Install on your computer:
   - Node.js 20+ → https://nodejs.org (click "LTS" download)
   - Git → https://git-scm.com/downloads
   - Verify: open Terminal/Command Prompt and run:
     node --version    # should show v20.x.x
     git --version     # should show git version 2.x.x

---

## STEP 1 — SET UP SUPABASE (your database)

1. Go to https://supabase.com → Sign up → New Project
2. Give it a name (e.g. "nexmedicon-clinic"), choose a region close to India (Singapore)
3. **IMPORTANT**: Save the database password — you'll need it later
4. Wait ~2 minutes for it to start

5. Go to SQL Editor (left sidebar) and run these files IN ORDER:
   - Paste contents of `supabase_setup.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_add_discharge.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_add_billing.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v5_updates.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v6_updates.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v7_abdm_fhir.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_add_aadhaar.sql` → Run
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v8_roles.sql` → Run ← **NEW: roles & user management**
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v9_appointments.sql` → Run ← **NEW: appointments in database**
   - Paste contents of `supabase_v10_procedures.sql` → Run ← **NEW: procedure tracking**

   ⚠️ Do NOT run `seed_demo_data.sql` on a production database!

6. Get your Supabase credentials:
   - Go to Project Settings → API
   - Copy "Project URL" → this is your `SUPABASE_URL`
   - Copy "anon public" key → this is your `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`
   - Copy "service_role" key → this is your `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`
     ⚠️ Keep the service_role key secret — never expose it in frontend code

---

## STEP 2 — GET AI API KEY (for PDF/photo scanning)

You only need ONE of these:

**Option A: OpenAI (easiest, $5 credit lasts months)**
1. Go to https://platform.openai.com → Sign up
2. Go to API Keys → Create new secret key
3. Copy the key (starts with sk-)

**Option B: Anthropic Claude**
1. Go to https://console.anthropic.com → Sign up
2. Go to API Keys → Create Key
3. Copy the key (starts with sk-ant-)

---

## STEP 3 — SET UP YOUR CODE ON GITHUB

Open Terminal in the `hms-mvp` folder:

\`\`\`bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Initialise git (if not already done)
git init
git add .
git commit -m "NexMedicon HMS v1"

# Create a new repo on GitHub (go to github.com → New Repository)
# Then connect:
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/nexmedicon-hms.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main
\`\`\`

---

## STEP 4 — DEPLOY TO VERCEL

1. Go to https://vercel.com → Sign up with GitHub → click "Import"
2. Find your `nexmedicon-hms` repo → Import
3. Framework: Next.js (auto-detected)
4. Click **Environment Variables** and add EACH of these:

| Variable Name | Value | Required? |
|---|---|---|
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` | Your Supabase Project URL | ✅ Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | Your Supabase anon key | ✅ Yes |
| `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` | Your Supabase service_role key | ✅ Yes (for user management) |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | Your OpenAI key (sk-...) | ✅ Yes (or use Anthropic) |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | Your Anthropic key (sk-ant-...) | Alternative to OpenAI |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_HOSPITAL_NAME` | e.g. Dr. Patel Gynecology Clinic | ✅ Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` | Leave blank for now (fill after deploy) | Fill after deploy |

Optional (for payments):
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID` | rzp_live_... | Optional |
| `RAZORPAY_KEY_ID` | rzp_live_... | Optional |
| `RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET` | Your Razorpay secret | Optional |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_UPI_ID` | yourname@bankname | Optional |

5. Click **Deploy** → wait 3-4 minutes

6. After deploy: copy your production URL (e.g. https://nexmedicon.vercel.app)
   Go back to Vercel → Settings → Environment Variables
   Update `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` = `https://nexmedicon.vercel.app`
   Then redeploy: Deployments → three dots → Redeploy

---

## STEP 5 — CREATE YOUR FIRST LOGIN (Admin Account)

1. Go to Supabase → Authentication → Users → **Add User**
2. Enter the **doctor/admin email** and a **password**
3. Open your production URL → log in with that email/password
4. The system will detect this is the first login and show a **"Set Up Admin Account"** screen
5. Enter the admin's full name → click "Create Admin Account"
6. You're now the admin with full access!

---

## STEP 6 — INVITE STAFF (Doctor & Receptionist)

1. Log in as admin → go to **Settings** (sidebar)
2. Scroll down to **"Manage Users"** section
3. Click **"Invite New User"**
4. Enter the staff member's:
   - Full name
   - Email address
   - Role: **Doctor** or **Staff**
5. Click "Create User" → a temporary password is generated
6. **Share the temporary password** with the staff member
7. They can log in and should change their password

### Role Permissions

| Feature | Admin | Doctor | Staff |
|---------|-------|--------|-------|
| View patients | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Register patients | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| OPD consultations | ✅ | ✅ | View only |
| Write prescriptions | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Billing | ✅ | View | ✅ |
| Financial reports | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Manage users | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Settings | ✅ | ✅ | View only |
| Delete patients | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |

---

## STEP 7 — CONFIGURE THE APP

1. Open your production URL → log in as admin
2. Go to **Settings** (sidebar) → fill in:
   - Hospital Name
   - Doctor Name & Qualifications
   - Address, Phone
   - Consultation fees
   - UPI ID (for payment links)
3. Click **Save**

---

## EVERY TIME YOU MAKE CHANGES

\`\`\`bash
# In your hms-mvp folder:
git add .
git commit -m "describe what you changed"
git push
\`\`\`

Vercel automatically redeploys in ~2 minutes after every push. 
No manual action needed — just push to GitHub.

---

## TROUBLESHOOTING

**"Invalid email or password"** → Check the email/password in Supabase → Authentication → Users

**"Access Not Configured"** → The user exists in Supabase Auth but doesn't have a clinic_users record. Admin needs to invite them from Settings → Manage Users.

**"Invalid API key"** → Check Vercel env vars, make sure no extra spaces, redeploy

**"Cannot connect to database"** → Check SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in Vercel env vars

**"PDF upload fails"** → 
  - Scanned image PDFs: use the Camera button to photograph instead
  - Fillable PDFs: should work without AI key
  - Check AI Status page in the app (/ai-setup)

**"Page not found" after changes** → Vercel may still be deploying, wait 2 min

**WhatsApp links not working** → Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to your full production URL

**Patient self-registration QR not working** → Same as above — NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL must be set

**"Forgot password" not sending email** → Check Supabase → Authentication → Email Templates. Supabase sends emails via their built-in SMTP (free tier: 4 emails/hour).

**User management "Failed to create"** → Make sure SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is set in Vercel env vars

---

## SHARE WITH THE CLINIC

Once deployed, share:
- **Doctor/Staff login URL**: `https://your-app.vercel.app` (they use their email/password)
- **Patient self-registration**: `https://your-app.vercel.app/intake?h=HospitalName`
  (shown as QR in app → Patient Intake → Digital Form tab)
- **Patient self-registration (Gujarati)**: `https://your-app.vercel.app/intake?h=HospitalName&lang=gu`

---

## ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES REFERENCE

\`\`\`
# Required
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxx.supabase.co
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbGc...
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=eyJhbGc...  ← NEW (for user management)
NEXT_PUBLIC_HOSPITAL_NAME=Your Hospital Name
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://your-app.vercel.app

# Required for PDF/photo scanning (add at least one)
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...

# Optional — payments
NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=rzp_live_...
RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=rzp_live_...
RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_UPI_ID=hospital@bankname
\`\`\`

---

## DATA SAFETY

- All patient data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security
- Only authenticated clinic staff can access patient records
- Role-based access: staff can't edit prescriptions, only admins can delete patients
- Supabase provides automatic daily backups (on Pro plan)
- Data is stored in SOC2-certified infrastructure
- The `/intake` page (patient self-registration) only allows inserting new patients — no read/update access

```

# next.config.js

```js
/** @type {import('next').NextConfig} */

const withPWA = require('next-pwa')({
  dest: 'public',
  register: true,
  skipWaiting: true,
  disable: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development',
  runtimeCaching: [
    {
      urlPattern: /^https:\/\/.*\.supabase\.co\/.*/i,
      handler: 'NetworkFirst',
      options: {
        cacheName: 'supabase-cache',
        expiration: { maxEntries: 50, maxAgeSeconds: 5 * 60 },
      },
    },
    {
      urlPattern: /\/_next\/static\/.*/i,
      handler: 'CacheFirst',
      options: {
        cacheName: 'next-static',
        expiration: { maxEntries: 200, maxAgeSeconds: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 },
      },
    },
  ],
})

const nextConfig = {
  experimental: {
    // Server-only CJS modules that must NOT be bundled for the browser.
    // NOTE: pdfjs-dist is intentionally excluded — it runs in the BROWSER
    // via dynamic import in pdf-to-image.ts.  Adding it here breaks client rendering.
    serverComponentsExternalPackages: ['pdf-parse', 'pdf-lib', 'tesseract.js', 'canvas'],
    // Allow useSearchParams() in client pages without requiring a Suspense boundary
    missingSuspenseWithCSRBailout: false,
  },
}

module.exports = withPWA(nextConfig)

```

# plans\production-readiness-plan.md

```md
# NexMedicon HMS — Production Readiness Plan
## Login, Roles, Real Clinic Deployment & Customization

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### What Exists Today

| Component | Current State | Production Ready? |
|-----------|--------------|-------------------|
| **Login** | Supabase email/password auth via `/login` | ⚠️ Partial — works but no roles |
| **Signup** | Manual only — admin creates users in Supabase dashboard | ❌ No self-signup page |
| **Roles** | None — every authenticated user sees everything | ❌ No doctor/staff/admin distinction |
| **Auth Guard** | `AppShell.tsx` checks `supabase.auth.getSession()` | ✅ Works |
| **Settings** | Stored in `localStorage` per browser | ⚠️ Not shared across devices |
| **Patient Data** | Stored in Supabase PostgreSQL with RLS | ✅ Secure, but RLS is wide open |
| **RLS Policies** | `allow_auth_*` — any authenticated user can do everything | ⚠️ Needs tightening |
| **Demo Data** | `seed_demo_data.sql` inserts fake patients | ⚠️ Must NOT run on production |

### Current Login Flow

\`\`\`mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[User opens app] --> B{Has session?}
    B -->|No| C[Redirect to /login]
    B -->|Yes| D[Show Dashboard]
    C --> E[Enter email + password]
    E --> F[Supabase signInWithPassword]
    F -->|Success| D
    F -->|Fail| G[Show error]
\`\`\`

### Key Gaps for Production

1. **No role system** — a receptionist can see billing reports, a doctor can delete patients
2. **No signup page** — doctor must go to Supabase dashboard to add users
3. **Settings in localStorage** — if doctor logs in from a different device, settings are lost
4. **Demo data mixed with real** — no clean separation
5. **No audit trail** — who changed what, when
6. **No password reset** — user is stuck if they forget password

---

## 2. Proposed Role System

### Three Roles

| Role | Who | Can Do | Cannot Do |
|------|-----|--------|-----------|
| **admin** | Clinic owner / IT person | Everything + manage users + see all reports + change settings | — |
| **doctor** | The treating physician | View/edit patients, consultations, prescriptions, discharge, ANC, labs, beds | Delete patients, manage users, see billing config |
| **staff** | Receptionist / nurse | Register patients, manage queue, billing, bed management, print forms | Edit consultations, write prescriptions, change settings |

### Database Design

\`\`\`sql
-- New table: clinic_users (links Supabase auth users to roles)
CREATE TABLE clinic_users (
  id          UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  auth_id     UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- references auth.users.id
  email       TEXT NOT NULL,
  full_name   TEXT NOT NULL,
  role        TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('admin', 'doctor', 'staff')),
  is_active   BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- New table: clinic_settings (replaces localStorage)
CREATE TABLE clinic_settings (
  id          UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  key         TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  value       TEXT,
  updated_by  UUID REFERENCES clinic_users(id),
  updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
\`\`\`

### How It Works

\`\`\`mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User logs in] --> B[Supabase auth.signInWithPassword]
    B --> C[Get auth.users.id]
    C --> D[Query clinic_users WHERE auth_id = id]
    D --> E{Found?}
    E -->|Yes| F[Load role: admin/doctor/staff]
    E -->|No| G[Show: Contact admin to get access]
    F --> H{Role?}
    H -->|admin| I[Full sidebar + user management]
    H -->|doctor| J[Clinical sidebar - no user mgmt]
    H -->|staff| K[Reception sidebar - no clinical editing]
\`\`\`

---

## 3. Signup and User Management Flow

### No Public Signup — Invite Only

For a real clinic, we do NOT want random people signing up. The flow is:

1. **First-time setup**: When the app is deployed, the deployer creates the first admin user in Supabase dashboard
2. **Admin invites others**: Admin goes to `/settings` → "Manage Users" → enters email + name + role → system creates the user
3. **Invited user**: Gets an email with a link to set their password → logs in

\`\`\`mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[Admin opens Manage Users] --> B[Enters email + name + role]
    B --> C[API calls supabase.auth.admin.createUser]
    C --> D[User gets email invitation]
    D --> E[User sets password]
    E --> F[User can log in with their role]
\`\`\`

### Password Reset

- Add a "Forgot Password?" link on the login page
- Uses Supabase `auth.resetPasswordForEmail()`
- User gets email → clicks link → sets new password

---

## 4. What Happens to Patient Data?

### The Critical Question: Demo vs Production

**Current situation**: The database may have demo/test data from development.

**For a real clinic deployment, here is the strategy**:

#### Option A: Fresh Database (Recommended for first real clinic)

1. Create a **new Supabase project** specifically for the clinic
2. Run all SQL migrations in order (setup → discharge → billing → v5 → v6 → v7 → v8_roles)
3. Do NOT run `seed_demo_data.sql`
4. Create the first admin user
5. Deploy to Vercel with the new Supabase credentials
6. Result: Clean database, zero patients, ready for real data

#### Option B: Clean Existing Database

1. Delete all demo data: `DELETE FROM encounters; DELETE FROM patients; DELETE FROM prescriptions;`
2. Reset MRN sequence: `ALTER SEQUENCE patient_mrn_seq RESTART WITH 1;`
3. Run the new role migration SQL
4. Result: Same database, but clean

### Data Safety Guarantees

| Concern | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| Patient data privacy | Supabase RLS ensures only authenticated clinic staff can access |
| Data backup | Supabase has automatic daily backups (Pro plan) |
| Data loss | PostgreSQL is ACID-compliant; no data loss on crashes |
| HIPAA-like compliance | Data stored in Supabase's SOC2-certified infrastructure |
| Multi-device access | All data is in the cloud — works from any device with login |

---

## 5. How to Update Details Based on Doctor Requirements

### Three Levels of Customization

#### Level 1: Settings Page (Doctor can do themselves)
- Hospital name, address, phone
- Doctor name, qualifications, registration number
- Consultation fees
- UPI ID for payments
- Footer note on prescriptions

**These are already built** — just need to move from localStorage to database.

#### Level 2: Configuration Changes (Admin/Developer)
- Add/remove sidebar menu items
- Change form fields (add new fields to patient registration)
- Modify print layouts
- Add new ward types for beds

**These require code changes** → developer makes changes → pushes to GitHub → Vercel auto-deploys.

#### Level 3: Feature Requests (Developer)
- New modules (e.g., pharmacy inventory, lab integration)
- Custom reports
- Integration with external systems

**These require development work** → plan → code → test → deploy.

### Update Workflow

\`\`\`mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Doctor requests a change] --> B{What type?}
    B -->|Settings| C[Doctor updates in /settings page]
    B -->|Config change| D[Developer edits code]
    B -->|New feature| E[Developer plans and builds]
    D --> F[Push to GitHub]
    E --> F
    F --> G[Vercel auto-deploys in 2 min]
    G --> H[Doctor sees changes on next refresh]
    C --> H
\`\`\`

---

## 6. Production Deployment Checklist

### Step-by-Step for a Real Clinic

\`\`\`
Phase 1: Setup (One-time)
├── Create new Supabase project for the clinic
├── Run all SQL migrations
├── Create admin user in Supabase Auth
├── Deploy to Vercel with clinic's env vars
├── Configure custom domain (optional: clinic.nexmedicon.com)
└── Test login works

Phase 2: Configuration
├── Admin logs in → goes to /settings
├── Fills in hospital name, doctor details, fees
├── Creates staff accounts (receptionist, nurse)
├── Tests patient registration flow
└── Tests prescription printing

Phase 3: Go Live
├── Train staff on the system (30 min)
├── Print QR code for patient self-registration
├── Start registering real patients
└── Monitor for issues first week

Phase 4: Ongoing
├── Doctor requests changes → developer updates
├── Regular backups (automatic with Supabase)
├── Monthly check: disk usage, performance
└── Feature updates pushed via GitHub
\`\`\`

---

## 7. Implementation Plan — Files to Create/Modify

### New Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `supabase_v8_roles.sql` | New migration: clinic_users table, clinic_settings table, tightened RLS |
| `src/lib/auth.ts` | Role loading, permission checks, user context |
| `src/app/api/users/route.ts` | API for admin to create/list/update users |
| `src/app/api/users/invite/route.ts` | API to invite new user via Supabase admin |
| `src/components/layout/RoleGuard.tsx` | Component that hides UI based on role |
| `plans/production-deployment-guide.md` | Step-by-step guide for deploying to a real clinic |

### Modified Files

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `src/app/login/page.tsx` | Add "Forgot Password?" link, remove demo button for production |
| `src/components/layout/AppShell.tsx` | Load user role on auth, pass to context |
| `src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx` | Filter nav items based on role |
| `src/app/settings/page.tsx` | Add "Manage Users" section for admin, move settings to DB |
| `src/lib/settings.ts` | Add DB-backed settings with localStorage fallback |
| `src/lib/supabase.ts` | Add server-side client for admin operations |
| `DEPLOY.md` | Update with production-specific instructions |

---

## 8. Questions for You Before Implementation

Before I start coding, I want to confirm a few things:

1. **First clinic**: Is this for a single doctor's clinic, or will multiple doctors share the system?
2. **Staff count**: How many staff members will use the system? (helps decide if we need a full user management UI or just manual setup)
3. **Custom domain**: Does the doctor want their own URL (e.g., `drclinic.com`) or is `something.vercel.app` fine?
4. **Existing data**: Is there any real patient data already in the current Supabase project, or is it all demo data?
5. **Billing**: Is the Razorpay payment integration needed, or will the clinic handle payments offline?

---

## Summary

The system is architecturally sound and nearly production-ready. The main gaps are:

1. **Role-based access control** — needs a `clinic_users` table and role checks in the UI
2. **User management** — admin needs to invite/manage staff without touching Supabase dashboard
3. **Settings persistence** — move from localStorage to database
4. **Clean data separation** — fresh Supabase project for each clinic
5. **Password reset** — add forgot password flow
6. **Production hardening** — remove demo button, tighten RLS policies

None of these are massive changes. The core HMS functionality (patients, OPD, prescriptions, beds, billing, ANC, labs, discharge) is already built and working.

```

# public\forms\consultation-diagnosis.html

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<title>Consultation & Diagnosis — NexMedicon</title>
<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #000; background: #fff; }
  @page { size: A4; margin: 12mm; }
  .header { text-align:center; border-bottom:2px solid #000; padding-bottom:6px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .header h1 { font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:1px; }
  .header h2 { font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; margin-top:2px; }
  .header .sub { font-size:10px; color:#444; margin-top:2px; }
  .section { margin-bottom:10px; }
  .section-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:bold; background:#f0f0f0; border:1px solid #999;
    padding:3px 6px; margin-bottom:5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
  .grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:6px; }
  .grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:6px; }
  .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1px; }
  .field label { font-size:9px; color:#444; font-weight:bold; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .line { border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:22px; background:#fffef0; }
  .box { border:1.5px solid #000; height:22px; background:#fffef0; padding:2px 4px; }
  .textarea-field { border:1.5px solid #000; background:#fffef0; width:100%; margin-top:2px; }
  .info-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:5px; }
  .info-row label { font-size:9px; font-weight:bold; white-space:nowrap; }
  .info-row .line { flex:1; border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:20px; background:#fffef0; }
  .checkbox-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-top:3px; }
  .checkbox-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; font-size:10px; }
  .checkbox-item .cb { width:12px; height:12px; border:1.5px solid #000; display:inline-block; }
  .rx-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:4px;
    border-bottom:1px solid #ccc; padding:3px 0; align-items:center; }
  .rx-row-head { font-size:9px; font-weight:bold; color:#444; background:#f5f5f5;
    padding:2px 0; border-bottom:1.5px solid #000; }
  .num-circle { width:16px; height:16px; border:1px solid #999; border-radius:50%;
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:9px; }
  .footer { margin-top:10px; border-top:1px dashed #999; padding-top:5px; font-size:9px; color:#666; }
  .sig-box { border:1px solid #000; height:50px; margin-top:4px; background:#fafafa; }
  .form-id { font-size:9px; color:#999; text-align:right; margin-bottom:3px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="form-id">FORM-CD · v1</div>

<div class="header">
  <h1 id="hospital-name">NexMedicon Hospital</h1>
  <div id="hospital-address" class="sub">Hospital Address · Phone: +91 XXXXX XXXXX</div>
  <h2>CONSULTATION &amp; DIAGNOSIS FORM</h2>
  <div class="sub">To be filled by Doctor · Fill clearly in BLOCK LETTERS</div>
</div>

<!-- PATIENT ID -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:6px;">
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Patient Name:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>MRN:</label>
        <div style="width:80px;border:1.5px solid #000;height:24px;background:#e8f0fe;margin-left:4px;"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:8px;">Date:</label><div class="line"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Doctor:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Visit Type:</label>
        <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin:0 0 0 4px;">
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> OPD First</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Follow-up</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> ANC</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Emergency</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DIAGNOSIS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Diagnosis / Impression</div>
  <div class="textarea-field" style="min-height:40px;"></div>
</div>

<!-- CLINICAL NOTES -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Clinical Notes / Findings</div>
  <div class="textarea-field" style="min-height:55px;"></div>
</div>

<!-- PRESCRIPTION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Prescription (Rx)</div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:3px;">
    <div class="rx-row rx-row-head">
      <div style="padding-left:20px;">#&nbsp;&nbsp;Drug Name</div>
      <div>Dose</div><div>Route</div><div>Frequency</div><div>Duration</div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8 drug rows -->
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">1</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">2</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">3</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">4</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">5</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rx-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="num-circle">6</div>
        <div style="flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:20px;background:#fffef0;"></div></div>
      <div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div><div class="box"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADVICE + FOLLOW-UP -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:8px;">
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Advice / Instructions</div>
      <div class="textarea-field" style="min-height:40px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Reports / Investigations Needed</div>
      <div class="textarea-field" style="min-height:40px;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:8px;">
    <div class="info-row"><label>Follow-up Date:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>Follow-up Note:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DOCTOR SIGNATURE -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:8px; align-items:end;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:3px;">DOCTOR'S SIGNATURE &amp; STAMP</div>
      <div class="sig-box"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:3px;">PATIENT'S SIGNATURE / THUMBPRINT</div>
      <div class="sig-box"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="footer">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>Scan this form to auto-populate the digital record in NexMedicon HMS</span>
    <span>FORM-CD · NexMedicon Hospital Management System</span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  try {
    const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('nexmedicon_settings') || '{}')
    if (s.hospitalName) document.getElementById('hospital-name').textContent = s.hospitalName
    if (s.address) document.getElementById('hospital-address').textContent = s.address + (s.phone ? ' · Phone: ' + s.phone : '')
  } catch(e) {}
</script>
</body>
</html>

```

# public\forms\gynecology-ob-exam.html

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<title>Gynecology & OB Examination — NexMedicon</title>
<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #000; background: #fff; }
  @page { size: A4; margin: 10mm; }
  .header { text-align:center; border-bottom:2px solid #000; padding-bottom:5px; margin-bottom:7px; }
  .header h1 { font-size:17px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:1px; }
  .header h2 { font-size:12px; font-weight:bold; margin-top:2px; }
  .header .sub { font-size:9px; color:#444; margin-top:2px; }
  .section { margin-bottom:8px; }
  .section-title { font-size:10px; font-weight:bold; background:#f0f4ff; border:1px solid #99c;
    padding:2px 5px; margin-bottom:4px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
  .grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:5px; }
  .grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:5px; }
  .grid-4 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:4px; }
  .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
  .field label { font-size:8px; color:#444; font-weight:bold; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:1px; }
  .field .box { border:1.5px solid #000; height:20px; background:#fffef0; padding:1px 3px; }
  .field .line { border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:20px; background:#fffef0; }
  .info-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .info-row label { font-size:8px; font-weight:bold; white-space:nowrap; }
  .info-row .line { flex:1; border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:18px; background:#fffef0; }
  .checkbox-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:5px; margin-top:2px; }
  .checkbox-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:2px; font-size:9px; }
  .checkbox-item .cb { width:11px; height:11px; border:1.5px solid #000; display:inline-block; }
  .textarea-field { border:1.5px solid #000; background:#fffef0; width:100%; min-height:30px; margin-top:2px; }
  .textarea-lg { min-height:45px; }
  .g-p-row { display:flex; gap:8px; }
  .g-p-box { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; }
  .g-p-box label { font-size:8px; font-weight:bold; }
  .g-p-box .num { width:35px; height:28px; border:2px solid #000; background:#fffef0;
    font-size:16px; text-align:center; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .sub-section { border:1px solid #ccd; border-radius:2px; padding:4px 5px; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .sub-section-title { font-size:9px; font-weight:bold; color:#336; margin-bottom:3px; }
  .footer { margin-top:8px; border-top:1px dashed #999; padding-top:4px; font-size:9px; color:#666; }
  .form-id { font-size:9px; color:#999; text-align:right; margin-bottom:2px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="form-id">FORM-GYN · v1</div>

<div class="header">
  <h1 id="hospital-name">NexMedicon Hospital</h1>
  <div id="hospital-address" class="sub">Hospital Address · Phone: +91 XXXXX XXXXX</div>
  <h2>GYNECOLOGY &amp; OBSTETRIC EXAMINATION FORM</h2>
  <div class="sub">To be filled by Doctor · Fill clearly in BLOCK LETTERS</div>
</div>

<!-- PATIENT ID -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Patient Name:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>MRN:</label>
        <div style="width:70px;border:1.5px solid #000;height:22px;background:#e8f0fe;margin-left:4px;"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:6px;">Date:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Age:</label>
        <div style="width:40px;" class="line"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:6px;">Doctor:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Visit Type:</label>
        <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin:0 0 0 4px;">
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> ANC</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> GYN OPD</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Follow-up</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- OBSTETRIC HISTORY -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Obstetric History</div>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:flex-end; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div class="g-p-box"><label>Gravida (G)</label><div class="num">__</div></div>
    <div class="g-p-box"><label>Para (P)</label><div class="num">__</div></div>
    <div class="g-p-box"><label>Abortion (A)</label><div class="num">__</div></div>
    <div class="g-p-box"><label>Living (L)</label><div class="num">__</div></div>
    <div style="flex:1;">
      <div class="info-row"><label>LMP:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>EDD:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1;">
      <div class="info-row"><label>GA (weeks):</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Cycle:</label>
        <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin:0 0 0 3px;">
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Regular</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Irregular</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABDOMINAL EXAMINATION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Per Abdomen Examination</div>
  <div class="grid-3" style="gap:5px; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div class="field"><label>Fundal Height (cm/wks)</label><div class="box"></div></div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Presentation</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Cephalic</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Breech</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Transverse</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Oblique</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Engagement</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Engaged</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 2/5</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 3/5</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 4/5</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 5/5 (free)</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>FHS (bpm)</label><div class="box"></div></div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Fetal Movement</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Present</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Absent</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Not assessed</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Liquor</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Normal</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Reduced</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Increased</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Absent</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Scar Tenderness</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Present</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Absent</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> N/A</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>Uterine Size</label><div class="box"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="field"><label>Per Abdomen Notes</label><div class="textarea-field"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- SPECULUM EXAMINATION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Per Speculum Examination</div>
  <div class="grid-3" style="gap:5px; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div class="field">
      <label>Cervix</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Healthy</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Congested</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Erosion</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Growth</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Not examined</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Discharge</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Nil</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Mucopurulent</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Bloody</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Watery</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Bleeding P/S</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Present</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Absent</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Not examined</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="field"><label>Per Speculum Notes</label><div class="textarea-field"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- PV EXAMINATION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Per Vaginum Examination</div>
  <div class="grid-3" style="gap:5px; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div class="field">
      <label>Cervix Feel</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Firm</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Soft</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Not examined</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>OS (dilation)</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Closed</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Fingertip</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 1cm</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 2cm</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> 3cm</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Fully dilated</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Not examined</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Uterus Position</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Anteverted</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Retroverted</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Mid-position</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>Right Ovary</label><div class="box"></div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Left Ovary</label><div class="box"></div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Adnexa</label><div class="box"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="field"><label>Per Vaginum Notes</label><div class="textarea-field"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- SUMMARY -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="field"><label>Clinical Impression / Additional Notes</label>
    <div class="textarea-field textarea-lg"></div></div>
</div>

<div class="footer">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>Doctor Signature: ________________________________ &nbsp; Time: ___________</span>
    <span>FORM-GYN · NexMedicon HMS</span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  try {
    const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('nexmedicon_settings') || '{}')
    if (s.hospitalName) document.getElementById('hospital-name').textContent = s.hospitalName
    if (s.address) document.getElementById('hospital-address').textContent = s.address + (s.phone ? ' · Phone: ' + s.phone : '')
  } catch(e) {}
</script>
</body>
</html>

```

# public\forms\patient-registration.html

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<title>Patient Registration Form — NexMedicon</title>
<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #000; background: #fff; }
  @page { size: A4; margin: 12mm; }
  @media print { body { margin:0; } }
  .header { text-align:center; border-bottom:2.5px solid #000; padding-bottom:6px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .header h1 { font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .header h2 { font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; margin-top:3px; color:#1a56db; }
  .header .sub { font-size:9px; color:#555; margin-top:2px; }
  .section { margin-bottom:9px; }
  .section-title { font-size:10px; font-weight:bold; background:#dbeafe; border-left:3px solid #1a56db;
    padding:3px 6px; margin-bottom:5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
  .gu { font-size:9px; color:#555; font-weight:normal; text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; margin-left:6px; }
  .grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:5px; }
  .grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:5px; }
  .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1px; }
  .field label { font-size:8.5px; color:#444; font-weight:bold; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .field .box { border:1.5px solid #000; height:22px; background:#fffef0; padding:2px 4px; }
  .field .line { border-bottom:1.5px solid #000; height:22px; background:#fffef0; }
  .checkbox-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-top:3px; }
  .checkbox-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; font-size:10px; }
  .checkbox-item .cb { width:13px; height:13px; border:1.5px solid #000; display:inline-block; background:#fffef0; }
  .textarea-field { border:1.5px solid #000; background:#fffef0; width:100%; min-height:32px; margin-top:1px; }
  .info-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:5px; }
  .info-row label { font-size:8.5px; font-weight:bold; white-space:nowrap; }
  .info-row .line { flex:1; border-bottom:1.5px solid #000; height:22px; background:#fffef0; }
  .mrn-area { border:2px solid #1a56db; background:#eff6ff; padding:5px 10px; text-align:center;
    border-radius:4px; display:inline-block; min-width:120px; }
  .mrn-area .label { font-size:8px; color:#1e40af; font-weight:bold; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .mrn-area .value { font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; color:#1e40af; letter-spacing:3px;
    border-bottom:1px solid #93c5fd; min-width:100px; text-align:center; height:24px; }
  .consent-box { border:1.5px solid #999; padding:6px 8px; background:#fafafa; font-size:9px; }
  .sig-line { border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:28px; background:#fffef0; margin-top:3px; }
  .form-id { font-size:9px; color:#999; text-align:right; margin-bottom:3px; }
  .important { font-size:9px; color:#b45309; font-weight:bold; background:#fef3c7;
    border:1px solid #fcd34d; padding:3px 6px; margin-bottom:5px; border-radius:3px; }
  .lang-note { font-size:8px; color:#1a56db; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #93c5fd;
    padding:3px 6px; margin-bottom:5px; border-radius:3px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="form-id">FORM-REG · v2 · NexMedicon HMS</div>

<div class="header">
  <h1 id="hospital-name">NexMedicon Hospital</h1>
  <div id="hospital-address" class="sub">Hospital Address · Phone: +91 XXXXX XXXXX</div>
  <h2>NEW PATIENT REGISTRATION FORM<br/><span style="font-size:11px; color:#555;">નવા દર્દી નોંધણી ફોર્મ</span></h2>
  <div class="sub">Please fill ALL fields in CAPITAL LETTERS clearly · Use BLOCK LETTERS only · Do not use cursive<br/>
  કૃપા કરીને બધી વિગતો સ્પષ્ટ રીતે ભરો · બ્લોક અક્ષરો વાપરો · ગુજરાતીમાં ભરી શકો છો</div>
</div>

<div class="important">
  ⚠ WRITE IN CAPITAL / BLOCK LETTERS ONLY — Example: RAVI PATEL, not ravi patel
</div>

<div class="lang-note">
  🌐 You may fill this form in English or Gujarati (ગુજરાતી). Our system reads both languages.
</div>

<!-- MRN (to be filled by staff) -->
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; margin-bottom:8px;">
  <div class="mrn-area">
    <div class="label">MRN (Staff Use Only)</div>
    <div class="value">&nbsp;</div>
  </div>
  <div style="flex:1; margin-left:15px;">
    <div class="info-row"><label>Registration Date / નોંધણી તારીખ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>Registered By:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PERSONAL INFORMATION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Personal Information <span class="gu">વ્યક્તિગત માહિતી</span></div>
  <div class="info-row"><label>Full Name (as on ID) / પૂરું નામ (ઓળખપત્ર મુજબ):</label><div class="line" style="border-bottom:2px solid #000;"></div></div>
  <div class="grid-3" style="gap:5px; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Date of Birth / જન્મ તારીખ (DD/MM/YYYY):</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Age / ઉંમર:</label><div style="width:50px;" class="line"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:6px;">Gender / લિંગ:</label></div>
      <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:2px;">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Female / સ્ત્રી</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Male / પુરૂષ</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Other / અન્ય</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <label style="font-size:8.5px;font-weight:bold;display:block;margin-bottom:2px;">BLOOD GROUP / લોહી જૂથ</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> A+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> A-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> B+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> B-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> O+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> O-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> AB+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> AB-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Unknown</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Contact Details <span class="gu">સંપર્ક વિગતો</span></div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="info-row"><label>Mobile Number / મોબાઈલ નંબર (10 digits):</label><div class="line" style="border-bottom:2px solid #000;"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>WhatsApp (if different):</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="info-row" style="margin-top:5px;"><label>Address / સરનામું (House No, Street, Area):</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  <div class="grid-3" style="gap:5px; margin-top:5px;">
    <div class="info-row"><label>City / શહેર:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>District / જિલ્લો:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>PIN Code / પિન કોડ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ID DOCUMENTS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Identity Documents <span class="gu">ઓળખ દસ્તાવેજો</span></div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="info-row"><label>Aadhaar Number / આધાર નંબર:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>ABHA Health ID / આભા હેલ્થ આઈડી:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EMERGENCY CONTACT -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Emergency Contact <span class="gu">કટોકટી સંપર્ક</span></div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="info-row"><label>Name / નામ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    <div class="info-row"><label>Mobile / મોબાઈલ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="info-row" style="margin-top:5px;">
    <label>Relation / સંબંધ:</label>
    <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin:0 0 0 6px;">
      <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Husband / પતિ</div>
      <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Father / પિતા</div>
      <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Mother / માતા</div>
      <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Sibling / ભાઈ-બહેન</div>
      <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Other / અન્ય</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- INSURANCE -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Insurance / Mediclaim <span class="gu">વીમો / મેડિક્લેમ</span></div>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:5px;">
    <div>
      <label style="font-size:8.5px;font-weight:bold;">Mediclaim / Health Insurance / હેલ્થ ઈન્સ્યોરન્સ:</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:2px;">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Yes / હા</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> No / ના</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <label style="font-size:8.5px;font-weight:bold;">Cashless Facility / કેશલેસ:</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:2px;">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Yes / હા</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> No / ના</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1;">
      <div class="info-row"><label>Policy / TPA Name / પોલિસી નામ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HOW DID YOU FIND US -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">How Did You Find Us? <span class="gu">તમે અમને કેવી રીતે શોધ્યા?</span></div>
  <div class="checkbox-row">
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Doctor Referral</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Patient Referral</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Advertisement</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Google / Internet</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Social Media</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Walk-in</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Camp / Outreach</div>
    <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Other: ___________________</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONSENT -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="consent-box">
    <div style="font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:3px;">Patient Consent / દર્દીની સંમતિ</div>
    I hereby give my consent to <span id="hospital-name-consent">NexMedicon Hospital</span> for recording and storing my personal and medical information in their digital system for the purpose of providing healthcare services. I understand this information is confidential and will not be shared without my consent except as required by law.
    <div style="margin-top:3px; color:#555; font-size:8px;">
      હું <span id="hospital-name-consent-gu">NexMedicon Hospital</span> ને મારી વ્યક્તિગત અને તબીબી માહિતી તેમની ડિજિટલ સિસ્ટમમાં આરોગ્ય સેવાના હેતુ માટે રેકોર્ડ કરવા અને સંગ્રહ કરવાની સંમતિ આપું છું.
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:10px; margin-top:6px;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;">Patient / Guardian Signature / દર્દી/વાલીની સહી</div>
      <div class="sig-line"></div>
      <div class="info-row" style="margin-top:3px;"><label>Date / તારીખ:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;">Relationship to patient (if Guardian) / સંબંધ</div>
      <div class="sig-line"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top:5px; font-size:8px; color:#666; text-align:center; border-top:1px dashed #ccc; padding-top:4px;">
  FORM-REG · NexMedicon Hospital Management System · Scan this form to auto-populate the digital registration record<br/>
  આ ફોર્મ સ્કેન કરો — ડિજિટલ નોંધણી રેકોર્ડ આપોઆપ ભરાશે
</div>

<script>
  try {
    const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('nexmedicon_settings') || '{}')
    if (s.hospitalName) {
      document.getElementById('hospital-name').textContent = s.hospitalName
      document.getElementById('hospital-name-consent').textContent = s.hospitalName
      document.getElementById('hospital-name-consent-gu').textContent = s.hospitalName
    }
    if (s.address) document.getElementById('hospital-address').textContent =
      s.address + (s.phone ? ' · Phone: ' + s.phone : '')
  } catch(e) {}
</script>
</body>
</html>

```

# public\forms\vitals-complaints.html

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<title>Vitals & Complaints — NexMedicon</title>
<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #000; background: #fff; }
  @page { size: A4; margin: 12mm; }
  @media print { body { margin:0; } }

  .header { text-align:center; border-bottom:2px solid #000; padding-bottom:6px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .header h1 { font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:1px; }
  .header h2 { font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; margin-top:2px; }
  .header .sub { font-size:10px; color:#444; margin-top:2px; }

  .section { margin-bottom:10px; }
  .section-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:bold; background:#f0f0f0; border:1px solid #999;
    padding:3px 6px; margin-bottom:4px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }

  .grid { display:grid; gap:4px; }
  .grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
  .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; }

  .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1px; }
  .field label { font-size:9px; color:#444; font-weight:bold; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .field .line { border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:22px; width:100%; background:#fffef0; }
  .field .box { border:1px solid #000; height:22px; width:100%; background:#fffef0; }

  /* OCR-friendly: bold borders, yellow bg for input areas */
  .ocr-field { border:1.5px solid #000 !important; background:#fffef0 !important; }

  .vitals-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:6px; }

  .bp-group { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; }
  .bp-group span { font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; }

  .checkbox-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-top:3px; }
  .checkbox-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; font-size:10px; }
  .checkbox-item .cb { width:12px; height:12px; border:1.5px solid #000; display:inline-block; }

  .textarea-field { border:1.5px solid #000; background:#fffef0; min-height:50px; width:100%; margin-top:2px; }
  .textarea-sm { min-height:35px; }

  .mrn-box { font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; border:2px solid #000;
    padding:4px 10px; display:inline-block; background:#e8f0fe; letter-spacing:2px; }

  .info-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; }
  .info-row label { font-size:9px; font-weight:bold; white-space:nowrap; }
  .info-row .line { flex:1; border-bottom:1px solid #000; height:20px; background:#fffef0; }

  .footer { margin-top:10px; border-top:1px dashed #999; padding-top:5px; font-size:9px; color:#666; }
  .footer-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:4px; }

  .pain-scale { display:flex; gap:4px; margin-top:3px; }
  .pain-box { width:22px; height:22px; border:1.5px solid #000; display:flex; align-items:center;
    justify-content:center; font-size:10px; font-weight:bold; background:#fffef0; }

  /* Page number */
  .form-id { position:fixed; top:5mm; right:12mm; font-size:9px; color:#999; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="form-id">FORM-VC · v1</div>

<!-- HEADER -->
<div class="header">
  <h1 id="hospital-name">NexMedicon Hospital</h1>
  <div id="hospital-address" class="sub">Hospital Address · Phone: +91 XXXXX XXXXX</div>
  <h2>VITALS &amp; COMPLAINTS FORM</h2>
  <div class="sub">Fill clearly in BLOCK LETTERS · For OCR scanning by receptionist</div>
</div>

<!-- PATIENT IDENTIFICATION -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Patient Information</div>
  <div class="grid grid-2" style="gap:6px;">
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Full Name:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
      <div style="margin-top:5px;" class="info-row"><label>MRN:</label><div style="width:80px;border:1.5px solid #000;height:24px;background:#e8f0fe;margin-left:4px;"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:8px;">Date:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="info-row"><label>Age:</label><div style="width:50px;" class="line"></div>
        <label style="margin-left:6px;">Gender:</label>
        <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin:0 0 0 4px;">
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> F</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> M</div>
          <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> Other</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:5px;" class="info-row"><label>Mobile:</label><div class="line"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- VITALS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Vitals (To be filled by nurse / receptionist)</div>
  <div class="vitals-grid">
    <div class="field">
      <label>Pulse (bpm)</label>
      <div class="box ocr-field" style="font-size:20px;text-align:center;padding-top:2px;">___</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>BP (mmHg)</label>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;margin-top:1px;">
        <div class="box ocr-field" style="width:55px;font-size:16px;text-align:center;">____</div>
        <span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;">/</span>
        <div class="box ocr-field" style="width:55px;font-size:16px;text-align:center;">____</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Temperature (°C)</label>
      <div class="box ocr-field" style="font-size:20px;text-align:center;padding-top:2px;">___</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>SpO₂ (%)</label>
      <div class="box ocr-field" style="font-size:20px;text-align:center;padding-top:2px;">___</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Weight (kg)</label>
      <div class="box ocr-field" style="font-size:20px;text-align:center;padding-top:2px;">___</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Height (cm)</label>
      <div class="box ocr-field" style="font-size:20px;text-align:center;padding-top:2px;">___</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Blood Group</label>
      <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:3px;">
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> A+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> A-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> B+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> B-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> O+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> O-</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> AB+</div>
        <div class="checkbox-item"><div class="cb"></div> AB-</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Pain Scale (0–10)</label>
      <div class="pain-scale">
        <div class="pain-box">0</div><div class="pain-box">1</div><div class="pain-box">2</div>
        <div class="pain-box">3</div><div class="pain-box">4</div><div class="pain-box">5</div>
        <div class="pain-box" style="background:#ffe0b2;">6</div>
        <div class="pain-box" style="background:#ffe0b2;">7</div>
        <div class="pain-box" style="background:#ffcdd2;">8</div>
        <div class="pain-box" style="background:#ffcdd2;">9</div>
        <div class="pain-box" style="background:#ef9a9a;">10</div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:#666;margin-top:2px;">Circle the number</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CHIEF COMPLAINT -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Chief Complaint(s)</div>
  <div class="textarea-field textarea-sm"></div>
</div>

<!-- HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">History of Present Illness (HPI)</div>
  <div class="textarea-field"></div>
</div>

<!-- ALLERGIES & CURRENT MEDS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="grid grid-2" style="gap:8px;">
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Known Allergies</div>
      <div class="textarea-field textarea-sm"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Current Medications</div>
      <div class="textarea-field textarea-sm"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<div class="footer">
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div>Receptionist / Nurse: ________________________</div>
    <div>Time of Recording: ________________________</div>
    <div>Scan Reference: ________________________</div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Auto-fill hospital name from localStorage if available
  try {
    const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('nexmedicon_settings') || '{}')
    if (s.hospitalName) document.getElementById('hospital-name').textContent = s.hospitalName
    if (s.address) document.getElementById('hospital-address').textContent = s.address + (s.phone ? ' · Phone: ' + s.phone : '')
  } catch(e) {}
</script>
</body>
</html>

```

# public\manifest.json

```json
{
  "name": "NexMedicon HMS",
  "short_name": "NexMedicon",
  "description": "Hospital Management System for Gynecology",
  "start_url": "/dashboard",
  "display": "standalone",
  "background_color": "#ffffff",
  "theme_color": "#2563eb",
  "orientation": "portrait-primary",
  "scope": "/",
  "icons": [
    {
      "src": "/icons/icon-72.png",
      "sizes": "72x72",
      "type": "image/png",
      "purpose": "any maskable"
    },
    {
```


# seed_demo_data.sql

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- NexMedicon HMS — Demo Seed Data
-- Realistic gynecology patients for pilot demo
--
-- HOW TO RUN:
-- 1. Open Supabase → SQL Editor → New Query
-- 2. Paste this entire file and click Run
-- 3. You should see "Demo data seeded successfully ✓"
--
-- SAFE TO RE-RUN: Uses INSERT with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
-- WARNING: This inserts ~15 patients + encounters + prescriptions.
--          Run once. Re-running will skip duplicates.
-- ============================================================

-- ── Wrap in a transaction so it's all-or-nothing ──────────────
BEGIN;

-- ── 1. PATIENTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Using fixed UUIDs so encounters can reference them reliably
INSERT INTO patients (id, full_name, age, date_of_birth, gender, mobile, blood_group, address, abha_id, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone)
VALUES
  -- ANC / Pregnancy patients
  ('11111111-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', 'Priya Sharma',       26, '1998-03-15', 'Female', '9876543210', 'B+', 'Block A, Satellite, Ahmedabad - 380015', '12345678901234', 'Rahul Sharma',   '9876543299'),
  ('11111111-0002-0002-0002-000000000002', 'Kavita Patel',       29, '1995-07-22', 'Female', '9876543211', 'A+', '14, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad - 380009',   '12345678902345', 'Dinesh Patel',   '9876543298'),
  ('11111111-0003-0003-0003-000000000003', 'Meena Desai',        32, '1992-11-08', 'Female', '9876543212', 'O+', '7, Bopal, Ahmedabad - 380058',          '12345678903456', 'Suresh Desai',   '9876543297'),
  ('11111111-0004-0004-0004-000000000004', 'Rima Shah',          24, '2000-05-30', 'Female', '9876543213', 'AB+','22, Maninagar, Ahmedabad - 380008',     NULL,             'Bharat Shah',    '9876543296'),
  ('11111111-0005-0005-0005-000000000005', 'Sunita Joshi',       35, '1989-09-12', 'Female', '9876543214', 'B-', '5, Gota, Ahmedabad - 382481',           '12345678905678', 'Rajesh Joshi',   '9876543295'),

  -- Gynecology (non-ANC) patients
  ('11111111-0006-0006-0006-000000000006', 'Anita Mehta',        28, '1996-01-20', 'Female', '9876543215', 'A-', '9, Vastrapur, Ahmedabad - 380015',      NULL,             'Kiran Mehta',    '9876543294'),
  ('11111111-0007-0007-0007-000000000007', 'Pooja Trivedi',      22, '2002-04-18', 'Female', '9876543216', 'O-', '3, Chandkheda, Ahmedabad - 382424',     '12345678907890', 'Hitesh Trivedi', '9876543293'),
  ('11111111-0008-0008-0008-000000000008', 'Lalita Verma',       41, '1983-12-05', 'Female', '9876543217', 'B+', '18, Paldi, Ahmedabad - 380007',         '12345678908901', 'Anil Verma',     '9876543292'),
  ('11111111-0009-0009-0009-000000000009', 'Rekha Nair',         33, '1991-06-25', 'Female', '9876543218', 'A+', '6, Thaltej, Ahmedabad - 380054',        '12345678909012', 'Sunil Nair',     '9876543291'),
  ('11111111-0010-0010-0010-000000000010', 'Deepa Agarwal',      27, '1997-08-14', 'Female', '9876543219', 'O+', '11, Naranpura, Ahmedabad - 380013',     NULL,             'Amit Agarwal',   '9876543290'),

  -- Follow-up overdue (for demo of alert)
  ('11111111-0011-0011-0011-000000000011', 'Varsha Solanki',     30, '1994-02-28', 'Female', '9876543220', 'AB-','25, Kudasan, Gandhinagar - 382421',     '12345678911234', 'Paresh Solanki', '9876543289'),
  ('11111111-0012-0012-0012-000000000012', 'Hetal Panchal',      25, '1999-10-07', 'Female', '9876543221', 'B+', '8, Motera, Ahmedabad - 380005',         NULL,             'Nish Panchal',   '9876543288'),

  -- IPD / admitted patients
  ('11111111-0013-0013-0013-000000000013', 'Bhavna Rana',        31, '1993-03-19', 'Female', '9876543222', 'A+', '12, Nikol, Ahmedabad - 382350',         '12345678913456', 'Vikas Rana',     '9876543287'),
  ('11111111-0014-0014-0014-000000000014', 'Sejal Chauhan',      38, '1986-07-01', 'Female', '9876543223', 'O+', '4, Vastral, Ahmedabad - 382418',        '12345678914567', 'Hemant Chauhan', '9876543286'),
  ('11111111-0015-0015-0015-000000000015', 'Nisha Yadav',        23, '2001-11-23', 'Female', '9876543224', 'B+', '16, Isanpur, Ahmedabad - 382443',       NULL,             'Raj Yadav',      '9876543285')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

-- ── 2. ENCOUNTERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Using current_date minus offsets so dates are always recent
INSERT INTO encounters (id, patient_id, encounter_date, encounter_type, chief_complaint, pulse, bp_systolic, bp_diastolic, temperature, spo2, weight, height, diagnosis, notes, ob_data, doctor_name)
VALUES
  -- Priya Sharma — ANC visits G2P1
  ('22222222-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', '11111111-0001-0001-0001-000000000001',
   CURRENT_DATE - 60, 'OPD', 'Routine ANC visit, mild nausea', 82, 110, 70, 37.0, 99, 58, 158,
   'Normal pregnancy — 20 weeks',
   'Patient comfortable. FHS heard clearly. No complaints except mild morning nausea.',
   '{"lmp":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE - 20*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","edd":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE + 20*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","gestational_age":"20 weeks 0 days","gravida":2,"para":1,"abortion":0,"living":1,"fhs":148,"liquor":"Normal","fundal_height":20,"presentation":"Cephalic","engagement":"Not engaged","uterus_size":"20 wks"}',
   'Dr. Demo'),
  ('22222222-0001-0001-0001-000000000002', '11111111-0001-0001-0001-000000000001',
   CURRENT_DATE - 14, 'OPD', 'Routine ANC — 28 weeks check', 84, 118, 74, 36.8, 98, 60, 158,
   'Normal ANC — 28 weeks',
   'All parameters within normal limits. GDM screening done — fasting 88 mg/dL (normal). Advised iron supplementation.',
   '{"lmp":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE - 28*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","edd":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE + 12*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","gestational_age":"28 weeks 0 days","gravida":2,"para":1,"abortion":0,"living":1,"fhs":152,"liquor":"Normal","fundal_height":28,"presentation":"Cephalic","engagement":"Not engaged","uterus_size":"28 wks"}',

  ('22222222-0002-0002-0002-000000000001', '11111111-0002-0002-0002-000000000002',
   CURRENT_DATE - 21, 'OPD', 'ANC visit — 32 weeks, baby position concern', 88, 124, 80, 37.1, 97, 72, 162,

   'Dr. Demo'),

  ('22222222-0003-0003-0003-000000000001', '11111111-0003-0003-0003-000000000003',

   'Dr. Demo'),

  -- Rima Shah — PCOS
  ('22222222-0004-0004-0004-000000000001', '11111111-0004-0004-0004-000000000004',
   CURRENT_DATE - 45, 'OPD', 'Irregular periods, weight gain, facial hair', 76, 112, 72, 37.0, 99, 68, 160,

  ('22222222-0004-0004-0004-000000000002', '11111111-0004-0004-0004-000000000004',

  -- Sunita Joshi — High risk ANC (age 35 + GDM)
  ('22222222-0005-0005-0005-000000000001', '11111111-0005-0005-0005-000000000005',
   CURRENT_DATE - 30, 'OPD', 'ANC visit — GDM screening positive', 86, 126, 82, 37.0, 98, 74, 157,

   'OGTT positive — fasting 102, post-load 168. Started on dietary modification + Metformin. Referred to diabetologist.',
   '{"lmp":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE - 30*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","edd":"' || to_char(CURRENT_DATE + 10*7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '","gestational_age":"30 weeks 0 days","gravida":3,"para":2,"abortion":0,"living":2,"fhs":144,"liquor":"Normal","fundal_height":30,"presentation":"Cephalic","engagement":"Not engaged","uterus_size":"30 wks"}',
   'Dr. Demo'),

  -- Anita Mehta — Fibroid
  ('22222222-0006-0006-0006-000000000001', '11111111-0006-0006-0006-000000000006',
   CURRENT_DATE - 20, 'OPD', 'Heavy menstrual bleeding for 4 months', 80, 108, 68, 36.8, 99, 55, 161,
   'Uterine Fibroids — intramural — multiple',

   '{"uterus_size":"10 wks","per_abdomen":"Uterus palpable just above pubic symphysis, firm, irregular"}',

  -- Pooja Trivedi — Dysmenorrhea / Endometriosis query
  ('22222222-0007-0007-0007-000000000001', '11111111-0007-0007-0007-000000000007',
   CURRENT_DATE - 10, 'OPD', 'Severe pain during periods, painful intercourse', 78, 106, 66, 36.7, 100, 52, 163,

  -- Lalita Verma — Menopause
  ('22222222-0008-0008-0008-000000000001', '11111111-0008-0008-0008-000000000008',
   CURRENT_DATE - 35, 'OPD', 'Hot flashes, mood swings, last period 14 months ago', 72, 132, 84, 36.6, 99, 62, 152,

  -- Rekha Nair — Recurrent pregnancy loss
  ('22222222-0009-0009-0009-000000000001', '11111111-0009-0009-0009-000000000009',
   CURRENT_DATE - 50, 'OPD', 'History of 3 miscarriages, planning pregnancy', 74, 114, 74, 36.9, 99, 57, 159,

   'Thrombophilia workup: Antiphospholipid antibodies positive. Started on low-dose aspirin + heparin for next pregnancy. Genetic counselling advised.',

  ('22222222-0010-0010-0010-000000000001', '11111111-0010-0010-0010-000000000010',
   CURRENT_DATE - 25, 'OPD', 'Not conceiving for 2 years', 76, 110, 70, 36.8, 99, 61, 162,

   'AFC 18 bilateral. Husband SA: low motility 22%. Started on Letrozole stimulation protocol.',

  -- Varsha Solanki — Overdue follow-up
  ('22222222-0011-0011-0011-000000000001', '11111111-0011-0011-0011-000000000011',

   'Cervical Ectropion — for colposcopy',
   'PAP smear: LSIL. Colposcopy scheduled. Patient to return with biopsy report.',
```
